underlying_goal: Configure NanoClaw with multi-agent workflow and set up a bug fix automation pipeline that receives bugs via HTTP and uses Claude with git worktree to fix them
friction_detail: Claude attempted to modify Telegram configuration when user only wanted to test Feishu channel, requiring user to interrupt and correct
brief_summary: User wanted to configure multi-agent workflow, fix non-working Feishu channel, and set up HTTP-triggered bug fix automation - Feishu and bug workflow were configured successfully but Telegram was temporarily disabled
